options.name: Blocking modal
options.description: Takeover dialog, one request at a time; nothing else clickable until every queued request is decided.

options.name: Toast stack
options.description: Persistent corner toasts with inline approve/deny; the board stays fully usable.

options.name: Permission inbox
options.description: Rail item with badge opens a push-in panel: grouped by agent, batch approval, 24h decision history.

options.name: Inline on the board
options.description: The request docks onto the affected ticket card; decide in full work context.

options.name: Command strip
options.description: Slim amber bar under the header with the oldest request and global shortcuts; dropdown for the rest. Chosen for implementation (HUM-161).
